6 Summer 2025 Dress Trends To Know Before Everyone Else

Smocked Dresses

Smocked dresses with smocked bodices and cotton poplin textures make the easiest summer uniform.

Polka Dot Dresses

Polka dot dresses are back with a cleaner palette and a more grown-up shape this season.

Boho Dresses

Boho dresses with flutter sleeves and floral details feel airy without losing structure.

Gingham Dresses

Gingham dresses are being cut in an a-line shape and often finished in crisp cotton poplin.

Babydoll Dresses

Babydoll dresses are leaning cleaner this year, often anchored by a square neckline and flat sandals.
